question: Are there any leaves on the trees in the image? Select from the following options: (A) Yes, all of them have leaves. (B) I can't tell from the image. (C) Some of them have leaves, some don't. (D) No, none of them have leaves.
gold_answer: I can't tell from the image
answer_choices: Yes, all of them have leaves
I can't tell from the image
Some of them have leaves, some don't
No, none of them have leaves
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
